items.name: PrivacyGuard
items.description: PrivacyGuard 脱敏卫士 - 一个中国五线小城市律师用AI 开发的，基于Python + PyQt6 的 完全本地的PDF/Word 文档智能脱敏、脱密工具，“先脱敏，再上传”，支持文本识别、OCR 扫描、手动标记等多种脱敏方式，提供双栏对比预览和批量处理功能。（Local-based intelligent document redaction tool）

items.name: Claude-Decision-Council
items.description: Decision Council is a multi-agent system with four councils: a technical adversarial panel, a visionary “pantheon” of innovators, a brutal functional critique team, and a supreme council led by a philosopher-king President. Each analyzes independently; the President synthesizes and delivers a final verdict.
